subcodes.first_line: O kind friend! Praise be to God that thou art known by the name of contentment and thy heart is resigned to His decree. The station of contentment is among the most exalted [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار مهربان الحمد لله که باسم رضاای و بدل راضی بقضا مقام رضا از اعظم
subcodes.subjects: @acquiescence and resignation; contentment, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
